nl_quality.name: nl_quality
nl_quality.details: Numbers are internally consistent and waste_evidence cites concrete metrics, but technical explanations are thin and generic (e.g. 'steady zombie', 'below threshold') without naming the actual instance types, target sizes, or why alternatives were rejected, and i-b503 risk entries are vague labels rather than actionable descriptions.
